headline: Expeditors’s (NYSE:EXPD) Q1 CY2026: Strong Sales
summary: Logistics and freight forwarding company Expeditors (NYSE:EXPD) announced better-than-expected revenue in Q1 CY2026, with sales up 4.4% year on year to $2.78 billion. Its non-GAAP profit of $1.71 per share was 28.7% above analysts’ consensus estimates.

headline: Expeditors Announces Semi-Annual Cash Dividend of $0.81
summary: BELLEVUE, Wash., May 05, 2026--Expeditors International of Washington, Inc. (NYSE:EXPD) today announced that on May 4, 2026 its Board of Directors declared a semi-annual cash dividend of $0.81 per share, payable on June 15, 2026 to shareholders of record as of June 1, 2026.
